upgrade_comfy_bunk_bottom.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Bottom Bunk created by the Carpenter. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Bottom Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.

upgrade_comfy_bunk_top.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Top Bunk created by the Carpenter. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Top Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.

upgrade_comfy_clay_bunk_bottom.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Clay Bottom Bunk created by the Potter. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Clay Bottom Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.
upgrade_comfy_clay_bunk_bottom.display_name: Replace with Comfy Clay Bottom Bunk

upgrade_comfy_clay_bunk_top.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Clay Top Bunk created by the Potter. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Clay Top Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.
upgrade_comfy_clay_bunk_top.display_name: Replace with Comfy Clay Top Bunk

upgrade_comfy_stone_bunk_bottom.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Stone Bottom Bunk created by the Mason. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Stone Bottom Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.
upgrade_comfy_stone_bunk_bottom.display_name: Replace with Comfy Stone Bottom Bunk

upgrade_comfy_stone_bunk_top.description: Order a worker to replace this bed with a Comfy Stone Top Bunk created by the Mason. A craft order will be given if no Comfy Stone Top Bunk is found in the town's inventory. The bed owner will remain the same.
upgrade_comfy_stone_bunk_top.display_name: Replace with Comfy Stone Top Bunk

level_1_data.training_perk_description: The Footman can use Regular and Upgraded Training Dummies to train their combat techniques and earn experience up to Job Level 6
level_1_data.perk_000_description: The Footman knows that all combats may have mortal consequences, and attacks with renewed determination.

level_3_data.training_complete_description: The Footman has finished their basic combat training and can now seek new opportunities like trying to become a Knight!

archer_description.description: A rearguard combatant capable of using ranged weaponry like bows, crossbows and a variety of hindering types of arrows or bolts to attack their foes.

level_1_data.training_perk_description: The Archer can use Regular and Upgraded Archery Targets to train their precision and earn experience up to Job Level 6

knight_description.description: A defensive fighter focused on protecting allies from harm and rounding up enemies, striking fear in their hearts!

level_1_data.training_perk_description: The Knight can use Regular and Upgraded Training Dummies to train their defensive taunting skills and earn experience up to Job Level 6
